title: MarketContextSnapshot
description: Point-in-time market state for one crypto futures or perpetual futures instrument. One snapshot = one (canonical_symbol, venue, captured_at) triple, carrying inline per-timeframe data, derivatives context, and evidence references. P1 schema version 0.1.0.

schema_version.description: Semver of the schema this snapshot conforms to.

canonical_symbol.description: BASEQUOTE (e.g. BTCUSDT), optionally with @venue suffix (e.g. BTCUSDT@binance).

venue.description: Exchange identifier. 'venue_agnostic' is used when the snapshot is not tied to a specific exchange.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC with Z suffix. When the snapshot was captured.

instrument_type.description: Derivative instrument type. P1 fixtures use 'perpetual'.

regime.description: Strict enum of 8 market regimes. P2 (scoring engine) is the owner of regime classification; P1 fixtures may use 'unknown'.

timeframes.description: Per-timeframe current bar. All 6 keys MUST be present; values MAY be null when the timeframe is not yet available or the data is stale.

funding_rate.description: Current funding rate as a decimal (e.g. '0.0001' for 1 bps). null when venue does not provide funding or data is unavailable.

funding_rate_next_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC. Next funding event. null when not provided.

open_interest.description: Open interest in contract units. null when unavailable.

open_interest_usd.description: Open interest in USD. null when unavailable.

mark_price.description: Mark price used for margining. null when unavailable.

last_price.description: Last traded price. null when the venue has not reported a trade in the snapshot window.

mark_last_spread_bps.description: |mark - last| / last * 10000. null when either mark or last is null.

liquidations_24h_long_usd.description: 24h liquidations on the long side, USD. null when unavailable.

liquidations_24h_short_usd.description: 24h liquidations on the short side, USD. null when unavailable.

derivatives_context.description: Derivatives-specific context. Fields are required-but-nullable (key MUST be present, value MAY be null).

evidence_refs.description: Non-empty array of pointers to captured evidence. P1 fixtures reference their own filename.

disclaimer_present.description: MUST be true. Constitution I requires a non-advice disclaimer on every signal and snapshot. The disclaimer text is rendered in P3, not stored in the snapshot.

notes.description: Free text. MUST NOT contain advisory language (no buy/sell/hold, no target price, no rating, no recommendation, no forecast).

realized_volatility_pct.description: Realized volatility (annualized) as a percentage. Window: 20 periods of this timeframe. null when the input series is too short to compute.

atr_pct.description: ATR / price * 100. null when the input series is too short to compute.
